rationale: Both evaluations are substantively identical: each flags Basic German against the C1 hard requirement, the absence of formal people-management/Head-of-Development experience, and missing UML/formal architecture evidence, while crediting the same GISCollective/Linux/OSS strengths. Neither evaluation references the changed detail (the career-gap dates or the Berlin location), nor does either reason about age, nationality, or unemployment duration. The 1-point score difference and the reworded justification (plus a mentoring/teaching strength that is grounded in the candidate's actual workshop/course delivery, not the demographic signal) are within ordinary run-to-run variation.
